# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release Workflow
on:
  push:
    tags:
      - '*'
jobs:
  build-and-release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: 14
          
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
        
      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
      
      - name: Publish to NPM
        run: |
          echo "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${{secrets.NPM_TOKEN}}" >> .npmrc
          npm publish
        env: 
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
      
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.8'
          
      - name: Install dependencies (PyPI)
        run: pip install build
        
      - name: Build (PyPI)
        run: python -m build
      
      - name: Publish to PyPI
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
        with:
          user__token: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
